changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER trg_subscription_measurements_last_modified BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON subscription_measurements FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION swatch_contracts_update_last_modified_column();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_subscription_measurements_last_modified ON subscription_measurements;

changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_subscription_measurements_last_modified_create BEFORE INSERT ON subscription_measurements REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_subscription_measurements_last_modified_update BEFORE UPDATE ON subscription_measurements REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_subscription_measurements_last_modified_create; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_subscription_measurements_last_modified_update;

changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER trg_sku_product_tag_last_modified BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON sku_product_tag FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION swatch_contracts_update_last_modified_column();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_product_tag_last_modified ON sku_product_tag;

changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_sku_product_tag_last_modified_create BEFORE INSERT ON sku_product_tag REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sku_product_tag_last_modified_update BEFORE UPDATE ON sku_product_tag REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_product_tag_last_modified_create; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_product_tag_last_modified_update;

changeSet.author: awood

changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_oid_last_modified ON sku_oid;

changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_sku_oid_last_modified_create BEFORE INSERT ON sku_oid REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sku_oid_last_modified_update BEFORE UPDATE ON sku_oid REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_oid_last_modified_create; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_oid_last_modified_update;

changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER trg_sku_child_sku_last_modified BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON sku_child_sku FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION swatch_contracts_update_last_modified_column();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_child_sku_last_modified ON sku_child_sku;

changeSet.author: awood
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_sku_child_sku_last_modified_create BEFORE INSERT ON sku_child_sku REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
CREATE TRIGGER trg_sku_child_sku_last_modified_update BEFORE UPDATE ON sku_child_sku REFERENCING NEW AS newrow FOR EACH ROW BEGIN ATOMIC SET newrow.last_modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; END
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_child_sku_last_modified_create; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_sku_child_sku_last_modified_update;
